summary_ja: Dreaming cycle: 104 raw articles from last 3 days scanned. 52 unprocessed articles identified after cross-pipeline dedup (blog-triage, newsletter-triage, active-crawl, dreaming-triage). 1 take (Pinecone Nexus public preview), 4 references (Hebbia July update, Factory Droid Shield 2.0, ElevenLabs voice webinar, Sierra Ghostwriter hackathon, Ed Zitron BIS article). 38 skips across non-AI content, already-processed articles, and comprehensive entity coverage. Same-day pipeline saturation is high — blog/newsletter/active-crawl already consumed most AI-relevant articles.

decisions.title: What's New: July Disclosure 2026
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ Hebbia 7月アップデート。Skills共有・Excelプラグイン・固定収益データ対応・新チャートタイプ。entities/hebbia.mdのProductsセクション更新要。

decisions.title: Droid Shield 2.0: learned secret detection
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ Factory Droid Shield 2.0 — 学習ベースのシークレット検出。ファイルが540バイトと短く内容不十分だが、entities/factory.md更新候補。

decisions.title: Webinar Recap: Give Your Text Chatbot a Voice That Sounds Human
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ ElevenLabs voice agent webinar。デュアルWebSocketアーキテクチャ、ターンテイク、音声チャットボット統合の技術詳細。entities/elevenlabs.md enrichment候補。

decisions.title: The AI Industry Is Losing
decisions.reason_ja: ★★☆☆☆ Ed ZitronのBIS年次報告ベース記事。AI投資バブル・systemic risk論を展開。entities/ed-zitron.mdは既に包括的カバレッジあり（7件のBIS/systemic risk言及）。
